user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Scrambled Eggs & Avocado Toast
fields.short_description: Fluffy scrambled eggs served alongside whole-grain toast topped with mashed avocado and a pinch of sea salt.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk two large eggs with a splash of milk and cook over medium-low heat until soft and fluffy. Serve with a slice of toasted whole-grain bread topped with half a mashed avocado, a squeeze of lemon, and red pepper flakes.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; avocado adds heart-healthy monounsaturated fats and fiber; whole-grain toast provides complex carbohydrates for sustained energy.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user requested an egg-based breakfast for the day with the 'Smoky Base Pork Dinner'. Based on the context of Day 6 having 'Smoky' themed breakfast wraps, it is the most semantically consistent day for this addition. Position -1 appends it as a classic alternative to the existing wraps.
